# Florencia Nieto — Interior Designer

> Florencia Nieto is an Auckland-based interior designer creating considered,
> layered residential interiors across New Zealand. The studio offers full
> interior design, remote e-design, and one-off design consultations, led
> personally from first brief to final styling.

## About

Florencia Nieto is an interior designer based in Auckland, New Zealand, with an
international background shaped by her training in Argentina and a Master of
Applied Management completed in New Zealand. Her work is known for an editorial
eye and warm, livable spaces. She is also co-founder of Linger Creative, a
pottery and design brand.

- Location: Auckland (Mount Eden), New Zealand
- Service area: Auckland and across New Zealand (e-design available worldwide)
- Languages: English, Spanish
- Contact: hello@florencianieto.com · +64 274 294 273

## Services

- [Full Interior Design Service](https://florencianieto.com/services/full-interior-design): End-to-end interior design from concept and space planning to procurement, styling and installation. Typically $3,500–$5,000+ NZD depending on scope.
- [E-Design Service](https://florencianieto.com/services/e-design): Remote, document-led interior design — layout, moodboards, colour/material palette and a shopping list. From $650 NZD + GST per room.
- [Interior Design Consultation](https://florencianieto.com/services/consultation): A focused in-home or online session for advice on layout, colour and styling. From $250 NZD + GST (includes travel within 10km of Mount Eden).
